formatted_display: English: Wednesday, 22 April 2026 | Nepali: Wednesday, 09 Baishakh 2083
quote: If you practiced for the day, then you have won. If you were lazy for the day, then you have lost.
formatted_quote: "If you practiced for the day, then you have won. If you were lazy for the day, then you have lost." - Ming-Dao Deng
